category_title: Elementary students with severe behavioral disorders exhibiting high-frequency off-task and aggressive behaviors
minimal_context: The student is sitting at their desk during a teacher-led math lesson about ordering odd and even numbers.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Look at the worksheet on your desk. We are going to order these numbers and identify which are odd and which are even.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Shifts head and body to a direction other than the location of the learning stimuli for more than 5 seconds)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: (Speaking from across the room) Turn back around and look at your math work.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Raises voice beyond an average volume practiced in the class) I don't want to do this!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: (Waiting a few moments before responding from a distance) Stop shouting and sit quietly.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Stands up, being away from the desk while no body part touches the chair for more than 5 seconds)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Look at the worksheet on your desk. We are going to order these numbers and identify which are odd and which are even.

STUDENT: (Shifts head and body to a direction other than the location of the learning stimuli for more than 5 seconds)

TUTOR: (Speaking from across the room) Turn back around and look at your math work.

STUDENT: (Raises voice beyond an average volume practiced in the class) I don't want to do this!

TUTOR: (Waiting a few moments before responding from a distance) Stop shouting and sit quietly.

STUDENT: (Stands up, being away from the desk while no body part touches the chair for more than 5 seconds)

task.content: Math, speciﬁcally about properties of numbers, odd and even and ordering

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When the teacher uses increased decreasing interactions, delayed contingent responding to students, and avoidance from proximity
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Leaving (i.e., being away from one’s desk, while no body part touches the chair, for more than 5 seconds)
related_quotes: leaving (i.e., being away from one’s desk, while no body part touches the chair, for more than 5 seconds)

behavior_patterns.condition: During teacher-led instruction when appropriate classroom contingencies are weak
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Shouting (i.e., raising voice beyond an average volume practiced in the class)
related_quotes: shouting (i.e., raising voice beyond an average volume practiced in the class)

behavior_patterns.condition: During teacher-led instruction when appropriate classroom contingencies are weak
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Hitting (i.e., forcefully touching, pushing, or kicking other students)
related_quotes: hitting (i.e., forcefully touching, pushing, or kicking other students)
